evidence.source_text: Implemented a RAG-based customer support chatbot integrated with our existing ticketing system.

evidence.claim: Built document ingestion pipeline using OpenAI embeddings and Pinecone
evidence.source_text: Built the document ingestion pipeline (chunking, embedding via OpenAI embeddings, storing in Pinecone)

evidence.claim: Reduced average ticket resolution time by 31%
evidence.source_text: Deployment cut average ticket resolution time by 31% for the supported categories.

evidence.claim: Built and operated production ML pipelines using MLflow, Kubeflow, and internal feature store
evidence.source_text: Built and operated production ML pipelines using MLflow for experiment tracking, Kubeflow for orchestration, and our internal feature store.

evidence.claim: Designed model monitoring stack including data drift detection and alerting
evidence.source_text: Designed the model monitoring stack: data drift detection, prediction distribution checks, and alerting.

evidence.claim: Mentored a junior engineer through their first end-to-end ML project
evidence.source_text: Mentored a junior engineer through their first end-to-end ML project last year.

evidence.claim: Led team migration from keyword-search to embedding-based retrieval
evidence.source_text: Recently, I led the team that migrated our keyword-search-based product to embedding-based retrieval.

evidence.claim: Prioritizes evaluation rigor and offline benchmarks
evidence.source_text: I care a lot about evaluation rigor — too many teams ship models without offline benchmarks they trust.

evidence.claim: Values practical experience over purely academic learning
evidence.source_text: My academic background is in CS/ML but my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Proficiency in LLMs, BentoML, QLoRA, scikit-learn, Diffusion Models, Elasticsearch, Hugging Face, Qdrant, Django, MLOps, pgvector, Learning to Rank, and LlamaIndex
evidence.source_text: Skills: LLMs (expert, 59mo, 34 endorsements); BentoML (intermediate, 35mo, 2 endorsements); QLoRA (expert, 93mo, 24 endorsements); scikit-learn (expert, 74mo, 19 endorsements); Diffusion Models (advanced, 23mo, 47 endorsements); Elasticsearch (expert, 89mo, 31 endorsements); Hugging Face Transformers (advanced, 29mo, 60 endorsements); Qdrant (expert, 94mo, 13 endorsements); Django (intermediate, 24mo, 15 endorsements); MLOps (advanced, 35mo, 22 endorsements); pgvector (expert, 55mo, 18 endorsements); Learning to Rank (advanced, 52mo, 25 endorsements); LlamaIndex (expert, 44mo, 51 endorsements)
